text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text: ...What? Why you starin' at me like that?

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Lemme guess, you're holdin' back from<n>
commenting on how small I am.

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text: Ahahaha! I couldn't care less, not one<n>bit!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Size isn't just 'bout stature—it's about<n>attitude. If
ya set your mind to being<n>big, you can be as big
as ya want!
